header:
{
  "User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 13; SM-G998B) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Mobile Safari/537.36",
  "Accept": "text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,image/avif,image/webp,image/apng,*/*;q=0.8,application/signed-exchange;v=b3;q=0.7",
  "Accept-Language": "zh-CN,zh;q=0.9,en;q=0.8",
  "Referer": "https://dmbus.cc/",
  "Cache-Control": "max-age=0",
  "Upgrade-Insecure-Requests": "1",
  "Connection": "keep-alive"
}
ruleImage:
<js>
// 提取 class="cover" 的 a 标签上的 data-bg 属性
String(result.select(".cover").attr("data-bg"));
</js>
ruleLink:
<js>
// 提取详情页相对链接
let url = String(result.select("a.title").attr("href"));
// 补全绝对路径（防错处理）
url.startsWith("http") ? url : "https://dmbus.cc" + url;
</js>
ruleNextPage:
<js>
let doc = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(result);
let nextBtn = doc.select(".pages a:contains(下一页)");
if (nextBtn.length > 0) {
    let nextPath = String(nextBtn.attr("href"));
    nextPath.startsWith("http") ? nextPath : "https://dmbus.cc" + nextPath;
} else {
    ""; // 没有下一页时返回空
}
</js>
ruleTitle:
<js>
// 提取 class="title" 的 a 标签内的文本
String(result.select("a.title").text());
</js>
sortUrl:
搜索::https://dmbus.cc/s----------.html?wd={{source.getVariable()}}
国漫::https://dmbus.cc/list-1.html
日漫::https://dmbus.cc/list-2.html
欧美动漫::https://dmbus.cc/list-3.html
电影::https://dmbus.cc/list-4.html
style: ⚠️ 注意：请勿相信视频内的任何广告，后果自行承担
